features.name: parametric type wrapped in channel type
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter typed as a channel wrapping a parametric type reference, instantiated with a concrete channel type
features.snippet:
module #hw.param.decl<"param"> @test(in in0: !esi.channel<!hw.int<#hw.param.decl.ref<"param">>>);
instance test @test<param: i32 = 1>(in0: channel0: !esi.channel<i1>);

features.name: parameter reference used as type
features.description: Code should include a parameter reference used directly in a type annotation within a module port definition
features.snippet:
hw.module @test<param: i32>(in in0: !hw.int<#hw.param.decl.ref<"param">>>);
hw.instance "test" @test<param: i32 = 1>(in0: x: !hw.int<8>);
